modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy with mostly sunny conditions expected. Light winds throughout the day with a maximum temperature of 20°C and an overnight minimum of 8°C. Low rainfall chance at 20% with minimal precipitation expected.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Safety
modules.summary: A Permit to Burn is no longer required prior to lighting a fire in the open air. We are currently in the Open Burning Period (Unrestricted). Please always take care and verify local wind and daily weather conditions before ignition.
bullet_points: No permit required for open-air fires today
Always verify local wind and daily weather conditions before ignition
Ensure an adult is present and extinguishing equipment is handy

modules.title: Bin Collection Schedule
modules.summary: This week's collection is Recyclables (Yellow bin). Next week's scheduled collection will be Landfill (Red bin).
